nasb.text: to listen to the words of My servants the prophets, whom I have been sending to you again and again, but you have not listened;

esv.text: and to listen to the words of my servants the prophets whom I send to you urgently, though you have not listened,

cnv.text: 不聽從我差遣到你們那裡去的我的僕人眾先知的話，

ccb.text: 不听从我屡次派我的仆人——众先知传给你们的话，
